scripts.test: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run build:test && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types --test "test/**/*.test.ts"
scripts.test:integration: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run build:test && CODEX_IPC_INTEGRATION=1 node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types --test "test/integration/*.test.ts"
